[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01100101 4
1 10100010 3
2 10011010 4
3 01000000 1
4 11010000 3
5 10001000 2
6 00010100 2
7 10010000 2

01 11101101 6
12 10111110 6
23 11111111 a
34 01111101 6
45 10101010 4
56 01111111 7
67 11111110 7
70 00110111 5

35 11101101 6

60 11110110 6
71 01111111 7
